rationale: This wallet demonstrates a real-world Polymarket trader with a win rate of 39.3%. The Low verdict (p=1.00e+00) indicates performance near baseline, but NOT the overwhelming evidence seen in insider trading cases like Theo (97.3% win rate, p < 1e-300). This serves as a control case to validate that our methodology correctly distinguishes between legitimate skilled trading and insider trading with material non-public information.

comparison_to_theo.interpretation: The Theo cluster's 97.3% win rate is astronomically improbable without insider information. This control trader's 39.3% win rate is consistent with skilled but legitimate trading.

notes.data_source: Polymarket Data API (live fetch from blockchain data)
notes.purpose: Validate that the pipeline does NOT flag legitimate traders as Critical insiders
notes.methodology: Real wallet selected from Polymarket ecosystem, pipeline run on actual trade data
